steps.title: Read the probability contrast
steps.content: The probability of receiving swap lines was much higher in countries open to foreign-capital inflows than in countries restricting such inflows. That contrast shows that policy environments mattered to the decisions.

steps.title: Choose the influence phrase
steps.content: Choice A would mean policy environments were based on swap line decisions, reversing the relationship. Choice B suggests an indirect process, and choice D says policy was unrelated. "Material to" means relevant or important to the decisions. The answer is C.
